success_criteria: Codex instruction consumer validates and records this instruction without bypassing safety gates.

parameters.summary: Maintain HELD_MONITOR_ACTIVE_PUBLICATION_COOLDOWN and HELD_RECENT_PUBLICATION_FAILURE_COOLDOWN. No visible TV publication, no WebDAV mutation, no Plex refresh. Continue 15-minute monitor for full-season gate only. Await local forensic review of tv_first_section6_publication_forensic_handoff before any retry strategy.
